creator: ruud@t-boonproductions.nl
text:
After upgrading the following error apears when booting.

ACPI Error (psparse-0626): Method parse/execution failed [\_PR_.CPU0._PDC] (Node 0xffffff000123e9e0), AE_ALREADY_EXISTS
ACPI Error (psparse-0626): Method parse/execution failed [\_PR_.CPU1._PDC] (Node 0xffffff000123e9c0), AE_ALREADY_EXISTS

When checking sysctl -a hw.acpi.thermal is missing.

I'm using a Tyan mainboard type : Tomcat i7230A (S5160)
and a Intel(R) Pentium(R) D CPU 3.20GHz (3200.14-MHz K8-class CPU) CPU

How-To-Repeat: Rebooting the system and the error appears
